A career with us means joining a team of more than 230,000 dedicated people from around the globe. At Citi, you’ll have the opportunity to grow your career, give back to your community and make a real impact. Job Overview The Team: Citigroup Global Markets Inc. (CGMI) is a multifaceted legal entity within Citigroup Inc, registered with the SEC as a Broker-Dealer and Investment Advisor, subject to FINRA oversight. It also functions as a Swap Dealer and Futures Commission Merchant under the Commodities Futures & Trading Commission (CFTC). CGMI engages in a broad range of businesses, including equity sales and trading, spread and interest rate products, prime brokerage, debt and equity capital markets products, as well as mergers and acquisitions advisory services. Additionally, it provides personal wealth management, retail brokerage, and investment products. The CGMI Chief Risk Officer ("CRO") Office is part of the CBNA CRO Organization and is responsible for risk oversight of CGMI. The team is responsible for the risk oversight of the entity including governance, portfolio analytics, risk frameworks, as well as risk regulatory management. In addition to managing CGMI we manage the Office of the Swap Dealer CROs which is charged with central management and setting of a consistent governance approach to the risk management of our CFTC registered Swap Dealers and SEC registered Securities-Based Swap Dealers. About the Role: Join our dynamic Legal Entity Risk Management team as a Vice President, where you will play a pivotal role in safeguarding our US Broker-Dealer (CGMI/CGMHI) and its critical activities as a CFTC Swap Dealer and Futures Commission Merchant (FCM). jobs.title: Transaction Manager, Account Specialist
jobs.description: Transaction Manager, Account Specialist Apply (opens in new window) Save Job Req Id: 26946916 Location(s): Los Angeles, California, United States Job Type: Hybrid Posted: Mar. 19, 2026 Discover your future at Citi Working at Citi is far more than just a job. A career with us means joining a team of more than 230,000 dedicated people from around the globe. At Citi, you’ll have the opportunity to grow your career, give back to your community and make a real impact. Job Overview Account Specialist in Transaction Management will be responsible for supporting multiple aspects of the lending lifecycle including but not limited to monthly advance servicing, project funding, workflow management, and quality control. The team member will be accountable and responsible for operational oversight of servicing transactions of the business division being supported to ensure all internal and external requirements are met. Citi Community Capital (CCC) provides a suite of financial products to help affordable housing developers construct, rehabilitate, refinance, and acquire affordable multifamily housing across the country. Committed to the communities we serve, CCC finances both straightforward and highly structured transactions for non-profit and for-profit affordable housing developers, Community Development Financial Institutions, and state and local government agencies. Job Responsibilities: • Manage and service an active portfolio of multifamily rental construction transactions (e.g., loans, bonds, and letters of credit). • Strong understanding of deal structure, economic terms of transactions, and manage high-volume workflow. • Work closely with clients, governmental agencies, fiscal agents, and other external parties on monthly deal disbursement and approval process. • Coordinate various actions internally with Asset Managers, Construction Management, Risk, and Operations. • Review disbursement requests, inspection reports, title updates and managing flow of funds mechanics

As a Branch Manager, you will serve as the sales leader of the branch, accountable for acquiring, deepening and retaining customer relationships to drive consistent growth in primary checking, deposits, lending, credit cards and investments through disciplined execution, strong coaching, and effective performance management. You will lead, coach, and develop a team to consistently execute behaviors and improve banker productivity. You will foster an engaged, accountable culture focused on uncovering customer financial needs and recommending Wells Fargo solutions that deepen relationships and drive long-term value. You will balance growth objectives with strong operational risk
